match.locked: Predictions are locked — the match has kicked off!
match.lockedHint: Winners will be announced after the final whistle.
match.noMatches: No upcoming match yet. Check back soon!

form.title: Predict the score
form.name: Your name
form.phoneHint: Used only to identify your prediction and contact you if you win.
form.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid Saudi mobile number (05XXXXXXXX).
form.submitted: Your prediction is in. Good luck! 🍀
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.editUntilKickoff: You can change your prediction until kickoff.

winners.title: Winners
winners.subtitle: Correct predictions for every match — and the lucky wheel prize winner.
winners.noCompleted: No completed matches yet — winners will appear here after the first final whistle.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Text: Enter your name, mobile number and your expected final score before kickoff.
howItWorks.step2Text: Everyone who predicts the exact final score is a winner.
howItWorks.step3Text: After the match, the lucky wheel is spun live among the winners — one of them takes the prize!
